title: BEM-840 execute after 839
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-23 | 14:31 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem839_verify_after_response_retry_tick.json')
missing=prev.get('missing',[])
if not missing:
    status='triad_present_process_protocol'
    next_action='process real Claude response and prepare agreed protocol'
elif missing==['real_claude_response'] or ('real_claude_response' in missing and 'workflow_dispatch_results' not in missing and 'claude_runtime_state' not in missing):
    mail=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem840_real_response_required.md')
    mail.write_text('# BEM-840 | REAL CLAUDE RESPONSE REQUIRED'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Claude Internal Auditor: provide a real response for the multi-agent architecture/protocol agreement. Do not create blocker-only files. Include explicit Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED. Write to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem840_claude_response.md. Explain whether the development protocol is agreed and list required changes if any. No issue comments.'+sep)
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem840_claude_real_response_dispatch.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-840 real Claude response required after dispatch/runtime proof','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    status='real_response_prompt_and_dispatch_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify real Claude response file'
elif 'workflow_dispatch_results' in missing:
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem840_dispatch_result_probe.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'codex-runner.yml','workflow_id':'codex-runner.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-840 dispatch result proof repair','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    status='dispatch_result_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify workflow_dispatch_results'
elif 'claude_runtime_state' in missing:
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem840_runtime_state_probe.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-840 Claude runtime state proof repair','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    status='runtime_state_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify Claude runtime state'
else:
    status='unknown_missing_set'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-839 missing set'
state={'bem':'BEM-840','status':status,'bem839_status':prev.get('status'),'missing':missing,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem840_execute_after_bem839.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem840_execute_after_bem839.md').write_text('# BEM-840 | Execute After BEM-839 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-840'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem840_execute_after_bem839.json','governance/reports/bem840_execute_after_bem839.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']
if status=='real_response_prompt_and_dispatch_queued': changed.extend(['governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem840_real_response_required.md','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem840_claude_real_response_dispatch.json'])
if status=='dispatch_result_probe_queued': changed.append('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem840_dispatch_result_probe.json')
if status=='runtime_state_probe_queued': changed.append('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem840_runtime_state_probe.json')
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed next step after BEM-839: queued the missing proof repair, prioritizing real Claude response when dispatch and runtime proofs already exist')
"""
